_comment_stateParams: Markov state parameters — per-tick values (bias/mag ÷ TICKS_PER_MINUTE=4, noiseStd ÷ √4=2). See price-engine.md §1-1.
_comment_transitionMatrix: Default fallback matrix (symmetric). Used when stock has no archetype or unknown archetype key. See price-engine.md §1-3.
_comment_archetypeMatrices: Per-archetype asymmetric 7×7 Markov matrices. ADR-025. Row=current state, Col=next state. State order: STRONG_UP, UPTREND, SIDEWAYS, DOWNTREND, STRONG_DOWN, BREAKOUT_UP, BREAKOUT_DOWN. Each row must sum to 1.0. Matrices are calibrated at 50% asymmetry of the fully-designed values — tune upward post-playtest.

archetypeMatrices._comment_GROWTH: 성장주. UPTREND sticky, SIDEWAYS breaks upward ~2:1. seasonDrift +2.5%/season carries directional signal.
archetypeMatrices._comment_VALUE_DIVIDEND: 방어주/배당주. SIDEWAYS ultra-sticky, narrow oscillation. seasonDrift +0.8%/season.
archetypeMatrices._comment_CYCLICAL: 경기순환주. Near-zero net drift. Sector/macro events provide all direction.
archetypeMatrices._comment_EVENT_DRIVEN: 이벤트 드리븐(바이오/엔터). Ultra-sticky SIDEWAYS (0.995). Flat until news fires additive pressure. REQUIRES active event_tags on stock.
archetypeMatrices._comment_RECOVERY_UNCERTAIN: 낙폭과대/가치함정 후보. Occasional relief rallies. seasonDrift set per-stock (-1%~+2%). A3 재무제표로만 방향 판별 가능.
archetypeMatrices._comment_DECLINING_TRAP: 구조적 쇠퇴주. DOWNTREND very sticky (0.986). Brief relief rallies trap buyers. seasonDrift -1.5%/season.

_comment_macroTrend: Macro trend layer (ADR-026). Day-granularity 3-state Markov (0=TREND_UP, 1=FLAT, 2=TREND_DOWN) biases M1 micro transition matrix so weekly/monthly charts show directional trends. biasFactor multiplies UP-column or DOWN-column probabilities then renormalizes. volMultiplier[state]=[min,max] applied to M1 bar volumes each day.

macroTrend._comment_transitionMatrix: Default macro transition matrix. Row=current MacroState, Col=next. Self-prob 0.96 → avg duration 25d per trend (~1.25 trading months). Sufficient to fill a 20-day month with one dominant direction.
macroTrend._comment_biasFactor: Column multiplier when macro≠FLAT. TREND_UP boosts STRONG_UP(0)+UPTREND(1) columns; TREND_DOWN boosts DOWNTREND(3)+STRONG_DOWN(4) columns. Calibrated at 3.0; safe range [1.5, 5.0].
macroTrend._comment_volMultiplier: Daily volume multiplier range [min, max] per MacroState. Drawn once per day, applied to all M1 bars that day. [TREND_UP, FLAT, TREND_DOWN].
macroTrend._comment_driftScale: k_drift multiplier per MacroState [TREND_UP, FLAT, TREND_DOWN]. Reduces mean-reversion force during trends so price can deviate ~11% from base (vs 0.875% at full k_drift). FLAT uses 1.0 (unmodified).
macroTrend._comment_seasonBiasMacroNudge: Additive nudge applied to the FLAT row of the macro transition matrix based on season bias. BULL: FLAT→TREND_UP +0.06, FLAT→TREND_DOWN -0.02. BEAR: opposite. Nudges are renormalized after application.
macroTrend._comment_archetypeMacroMatrices: Per-archetype overrides for the 3×3 macro transition matrix. Self-probs increased vs v4 for longer-lasting trends. Absent archetypes fall back to default transitionMatrix above.

archetypeMacroMatrices._comment_GROWTH: UP very sticky (avg 33d), DOWN short-lived (avg 10d). Structural upward bias.
archetypeMacroMatrices._comment_VALUE_DIVIDEND: FLAT ultra-sticky (avg 33d). Narrow oscillation around fair value.
archetypeMacroMatrices._comment_CYCLICAL: Faster turnover (avg 10d each state). Sector/event-driven direction changes.
archetypeMacroMatrices._comment_EVENT_DRIVEN: FLAT ultra-sticky (avg 33d) until events fire. Events add pressure via NewsEventSystem.
archetypeMacroMatrices._comment_RECOVERY_UNCERTAIN: Slight DOWN bias (avg 20d down). A3 financials reveal true direction.
archetypeMacroMatrices._comment_DECLINING_TRAP: DOWN very sticky (avg 33d). Brief relief rallies trap buyers. seasonDrift -1.5%.

_comment_volScales: Volatility profile scaling arrays — index 0=LOW, 1=MEDIUM, 2=HIGH, 3=EXTREME. See price-engine.md §1-4.
_comment_volumeParams: Volume parameters per volatility profile and Markov state. See price-engine.md §4.
